payload.answer: Detected a duplicate Slack event delivery. Recorded the content only once and did not create duplicate memory.
citations: Input fixture: Same Slack event ID delivered twice for: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

entity_resolution.reason: Slack retry delivered the same event twice; process idempotently once. Also, 'Sam' and 'Bill Evans' are not uniquely resolved from the message alone, so any durable entity linkage should remain provisional.

memory_cards.statement: A Slack message states that Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

details: Slack event treated as an idempotent retry.
Stored, at most, a single low-confidence/provisional preference statement due to unresolved entity ambiguity.

repair_options: Ignore subsequent deliveries with the same Slack event ID.
If available, use prior context or directory data to disambiguate which Sam at Goldman is meant.
If needed, clarify whether 'Bill Evans' refers to the jazz pianist or another person/entity before strengthening the memory.
